Stage 1 — Fresh Cherry: Cultivation & Harvest
Coffee cherries are hand-picked from Gulmi highland farms at 1,200–1,800m elevation. Only fully ripe red cherries are selected (selective picking). The bright red colour indicates optimal sugar and flavour development. Gulmi Highlands Farm and Arghakhanchi Co-op supply ~80% of cherries during peak harvest season (Oct–Dec). Cherry moisture: 60–65%.
